title: This Open Source Repo Just Solved Claude Code's #1 Problem
summary: Graphify is an open-source tool that creates knowledge graphs from large code bases without using RAG, addressing memory limitations in code analysis tasks. It generates structured representations that enable more accurate and token-efficient responses for code understanding.
